hooks.command: powershell -NoProfile -NonInteractive -Command 'Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Windows.Forms; $n = New-Object System.Windows.Forms.NotifyIcon; $n.Icon = [System.Drawing.SystemIcons]::Information; $n.Visible = $true; $n.ShowBalloonTip(3000, "Claude Code", "Task complete!", "Info"); Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; $n.Dispose()'
